mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FFG_ATTENDANCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRUNC(WORK_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT TO_CHAR(CHECK_IN, 'HH24:MI:SS') FROM FFG_ATTENDANCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRUNC(WORK_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT TO_CHAR(CHECK_OUT, 'HH24:MI:SS') FROM FFG_ATTENDANCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRUNC(WORK_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FFG_ATTENDANCE ( ATTENDANCE_ID, USER_ID, WORK_DATE, CHECK_IN ) VALUES ( FFG_ATTENDANCE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE FFG_ATTENDANCE SET CHECK_OUT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRUNC(WORK_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND CHECK_OUT IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, '출근' AS type, TO_CHAR(CHECK_IN, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS time FROM FFG_ATTENDANCE WHERE CHECK_IN IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, '퇴근' AS type, TO_CHAR(CHECK_OUT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS time FROM FFG_ATTENDANCE WHERE CHECK_OUT IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC
